summary.keepoutSkipped_one: {{count}} board hole in a clamp zone — skipped
summary.keepoutSkipped_few: {{count}} board holes in a clamp zone — skipped
summary.keepoutSkipped_many: {{count}} board holes in a clamp zone — skipped
summary.keepoutSkipped_other: {{count}} board holes in a clamp zone — skipped
summary.registrationInKeepout: Registration holes in clamp zone ({{count}}) — move the registration hole or the clamp

run.stopTitle: Graceful stop — finishes the current hole and lifts to safe height
run.estopTitle: Immediate halt — machine stops without a safe-Z move
run.notConnected: Connect the machine in Equipment → Control tab
run.errorHint: Unlock the machine, then start again.
run.zeroHint: Work zero (0,0) is the selected datum corner of the panel (marked on the canvas; X right, Y up). Set it by jogging in Equipment → Control tab.
run.spindleHint: If the spindle is on a manual dial (3018 default), turn it on by hand — handy during the tool-change pause.
